calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-29-2024 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-23-2024 Continued To Mar-26-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to March 26, 2024 at 10:30am in Department 610.
Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: S. Le; Proceedings not reported. (610)

Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And Request For Sanctions Against Plaintiff Catherine A. Crawford
Off Calendar Jan-17-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RE: DEFENDANT CRESCENT MANOR PARTNERS, LP, APERTO PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC, AOF/PACIFIC AFFORDABLE HOUSING CORPORATION's Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And Request For Sanctions Against Plaintiff Catherine A. Crawford.

Appearances (via Zoom):
LEILA M. MOHSENI, ESQ., of TYSON & MENDES LLP, (628) 253-5070, for Defendants
No other appearances.

Defendant stipulates to the matter being decided by the pro tem Judge. The pro tem Judge and Defendant (both appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

The matter is discussed. Upon conclusion of discussion, the court's tentative ruling is adopted as follows: No opposition filed and no hard copies provided by Moving Party to Judge Pro Tem. Plaintiff ordered to provide Defendants with Code Compliant responses to Form Interrogatories Set One, Special Interrogatories Set One, and Request for Production Set One, on or before February 12, 2024 and Plaintiff is ordered to pay sanctions in the amount of $560 sanction with respect to each motion within 90 days from the date of the order is filed.

Counsel for prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order as to form and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem at rkane1089@aol.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Robert Kane. Clerk: R. Woods. Not Reported. (302/JPT)
